chart_type: 3 markers with x/y error bars + red trend line
method: §2 scatter (markers) + §2a x/y error bars (preserved from prior extraction); trend line traced from red HSV mask, per-column median row, linear fit across visible mask extent.
phase4_evidence: Red trend line endpoints (0.078, 20.309) → (35.021, 2.843) vs ground truth (0, 20.5) → (35.15, 2.864). Markers preserved at (23.62, 8.213), (27.08, 7.150), (30.01, 4.852) with symmetric x/y caps.
